auth.label: Key Secret
auth.description: Leexi Key Secret used together with your API Key ID through HTTP Basic Authentication. Generate both values in Leexi Settings > Company Settings > API Keys: https://app.leexi.ai/settings/api_keys

extraFields.label: API Key ID
extraFields.description: Leexi API Key ID paired with the Key Secret for HTTP Basic Authentication. Copy it from Leexi Settings > Company Settings > API Keys: https://app.leexi.ai/settings/api_keys

actions.name: list_calls
actions.description: List calls and meetings in the current Leexi workspace with optional filters.

page.description: The 1-based page number to request from Leexi.

items.description: The number of items to request per page from Leexi.

order.description: The call ordering returned by the Leexi list calls endpoint.

dateFilter.description: The Leexi date field used by from/to filters.

from.description: An ISO 8601 lower bound timestamp for the selected date filter.

to.description: An ISO 8601 upper bound timestamp for the selected date filter.

source.description: The integration slug used to filter calls.

items.description: One integration call id.

sourceIds.description: The integration call ids used to filter results.

items.description: The Leexi UUID for this resource.

ownerUuids.description: The owner user UUIDs used to filter calls.

items.description: The Leexi UUID for this resource.

items.description: One customer phone number.

customerPhoneNumbers.description: The customer phone numbers used to filter calls.

items.description: One customer email address.

customerEmailAddresses.description: The customer email addresses used to filter calls.

withSimpleTranscript.description: Whether Leexi should include the simpleTranscript string in each call item.
